pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot parent version to a release compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.2.x does not officially support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading to 3.4.x is required to ensure compatibility and access to features optimized for JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must explicitly target Java 21 to compile and run on the new JDK version, ensuring correct bytecode generation and access to Java 21 language features.
